programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Rob Brant
programme.desc: On June 26th 2021 Janibek Alimkhanuly battled Rob Brant for WBC Continental Americas middleweight title at the Virgin Hotels in Las Vegas with Brant going down in round 6 Alimkhanuly secured the victory in the eighth round.

programme.title: Jared Anderson vs Kingsley Ibeh
programme.desc: On February 13th, 2021 Jared Anderson dominated Kingsley Ibeh during "The Bubble" at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a six round bout Anderson secured the victory by knockout.

programme.title: Joe Smith Jr vs Eleider Alvarez
programme.desc: On August 22nd, 2020 Joe Smith Jr. and Eleider Alvarez fought each other in "The Bubble" at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went the full 12 rounds Smith Jr. was able to secure the victory.

programme.title: Joe Smith Jr vs Maxim Vlasov
programme.desc: On April 10th, 2021, Joe Smith Jr fought Maxim Vlasov for the WBO World Light Heavyweight Title at Osage Casino in Tulsa. In a great battle, Joe Smith Jr barely pulled off a very close majority decision victory.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Antonio Orozco
programme.desc: On September 14th, 2018 Jose Ramirez faced Antonio Orozco for the WBC World Super Lightweight title at the Save Mart Arena in Fresno, Ca. with Orozco suffering legal eye cuts in round 4 and 6 Ramirez was able to secure the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Jose Zepeda
programme.desc: On February 10th, 2019 Jose Ramirez battles Jose Zepeda for the WBC World Super Lightweight title at the Save Mart Arena in Fresno, Ca. with the 12 round bout ending in a majority decision win for Ramirez.

programme.title: Jose Zepeda vs Ivan Baranchyk
programme.desc: On October 3rd, 2020 Jose Zepeda faced Ivan Baranchyk in a battle for WBC silver super light weight title at the Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas with both opponents going down it ended in a victory for Zepeda.

programme.title: Josh Taylor vs Jose Ramirez
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 2021, Josh Taylor fought Jose Ramirez for the undisputed super lightweight title in Las Vegas. With a lot of bad blood going into the fight, Josh Taylor prevailed, winning by a close unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Juan Manuel Marquez vs Mike Alvarado
programme.desc: On May 17th, 2014, Juan Manuel Marquez fought Mike Alvarado in a WBO Welterweight Title eliminator at The Forum in Inglewood. Both fighters scored a knockdown in the bout, but it was Marquez that prevailed with a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ivan Robinson
programme.desc: On May 28th, 2005 Julio Cesar Chavez and Ivan Robinson faced eachother at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in an unamimous decision victory for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ken Sigurani
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1998 Julio Cesar Chavez faced Ken Sigurani at the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket resulting in a technical knock out win for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Scott Walker
programme.desc: On February 9th, 1996 Julio Cesar Chavez and Scott Walker faced each other in a 10 round bout at the Cesars Palace Sports Pavilion in Las Vegas that ended in the second round by technical knockout for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Kelly Pavlik vs Jermain Taylor 2
programme.desc: On February 16th, 2008 Kelly Pavlik faced Jermain Taylor for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas the 12 round bout resulted in a unanimous decision win for Pavlik.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Esteban Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 30th, 2022, Keyshawn Davis fought Esteban Sanchez in a lightweight bout at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Delivering a sixth round TKO, Davis showed his speed and agility and that he'll have a promising future in the lightweight division.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Jose Zaragoza
programme.desc: On December 11th, 2021, Keyshawn Davis and Jose Zaragoza fought at Madison Square Garden in New York resulting in Zaragoza going down twice in round two giving the victory to Keyshawn Davis.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Omar Tienda Bahena
programme.desc: On September 23rd, 2022 Keyshawn Davis fought Omar Tienda Bahena at the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ with Bahena going down in round 5 that solidfied Davis' win by technical knockout.

programme.title: Manny Pacquaio vs Timothy Bradley II

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Chris Algieri
programme.desc: On November 23rd, 2014, Manny Pacquiao and Chris Algieri faced each other for the WBO Welterweight Title in Macao. Manny Pacquaio defeated Chris Algieri after knocking Algieri down six times and securing a unanimous decision.

programme.desc: A woman learns not to mess with snakes, a suburban daredevil attempts an ambitious jump, and Tosh.0 pays tribute to reckless fireworks enthusiasts.

programme.title: Tosh.0
programme.desc: A woman throws bacon at police officers, a Christian activist accuses Monster Energy of being in league with the devil, and Daniel offers up unclaimed domain names.

programme.title: Tosh.0
programme.desc: Daniel consolidates two weeks of Olympics coverage, a Girl Scout lands on her face, and Tosh.0 staff members take the Sprite and bananas challenge.

programme.title: Tosh.0
programme.desc: A young man finds a mischievous use for mustard, Daniel guest stars on a wild YouTube star's new TV show, and the Tosh.0 staff takes fidget spinning to the next level.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a "color run" to bring awareness to our wounded soldier

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when it Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices. Meanwhile, Willie helps Jep prepare River for a competitive wrestling league by introducing him to his friend.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The spring thaw is in full melt mode as the drivers get one last lick before the ice roads close for the season.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Take a look at the men who undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth--ice road truckers. In the thick of winter truckers in giant eighteen-wheelers carry equipment and supplies to miners in the Canadian tundra.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jay hauls a 17-ton water tank over 31 inches of ice all the way to the De Beers Diamond mine. The rivalry heats up between Hugh and Rick as they compete for the highest load count.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: An arctic storm forces a road closure. Alex hauls a 44,000-pound diamond ore crusher across 350-miles of ice to the BHP mine. And brutal -40 degree temperatures start to take their toll on the truckers.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's the 18th day of the ice road season and truckers have delivered more than 3000 loads to the diamond mines. The temperatures are dropping, the loads are getting heavier and the ice is just three feet thick.

programme.title: Ax Men: All's Fair in Loggin' War
programme.desc: Down in the swamps of Louisiana, Shelby Stanga is trying to upgrade his logging empire, so he takes a risk and tries out some new equipment.

programme.title: Ax Men: Don't Cross the Boss
programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Rygaard logging has begun to claw its way back up the log count thanks to DJ Jeremiah, but today he's a no show.

programme.title: Ax Men: Davi and Goliath
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga is still without his jet boat, but fortunately he has his trusty assistant Davi and his Go-Devil to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Ax Men: Jet Logged
programme.desc: Shelby gets his jet boat back, and it now has a new five hundred horsepower engine that will help him get the job done.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As a hate plague rapidly spreads among robots and humans on Earth, a fallen leader must rise and reclaim the Matrix of Leadership from an infected Rodimus Prime in order to save the galaxy, Transformers, and all of mankind.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While Optimus Prime tries to figure out where his team and the Cybertron plasma chamber key have gone, the Autobots on the planet Nebulos team up with a rebel group to defeat the evil Hive, who have enlisted help from the Decepticons to fight back.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While Optimus Prime tries to figure out where his team and the Cybertron plasma chamber key have gone, the Autobots on the planet Nebulos team up with a rebel group to defeat the evil Hive, who have enlisted help from the Decepticons to fight back.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Following a civil war on planet Cyberton, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years! Finally, reawakened, the battle between good and evil continues on present-day Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Following a civil war on planet Cyberton, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years! Finally reawakened, the battle between good and evil continues on present-day Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. Using their robotic powers to hide in plain sight, the Autobots and Decepticons disguise themselves as Earth vehicles, and their war between good vs. evil continues as the Autobots try to stop the Decepticons from stealing Earth's resources.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime, Bumblebee, Jazz and the others in the battle to stop them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After his accidental transportation to Cybertron, Megatron returns- and he wants to get his hands on an anti-matter formula created on Earth that could mean limitless power for the Decepticons! Bumblebee and Spike race to warn the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one—the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one - the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Inspired by dinosaur skeletons, Ratchet and Wheeljack create Grimlock, Slag, and Sludge, the Dinobots! When Autobot forces are captured by the Decepticons, it may be up to the Dinobots to save the day.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy. Appealing to Grimlocks' simple arrogance, Megatron convinces the Dinobots to attack Optimus Prime and betray the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. With help from a human scientist, the Decepticons enslave people through mind control to fight against the Autobots and generate enough power for Megatron's sinister plan: bringing Cybertron into Earth's orbit to steal all of its energy.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 3. With Cybertron now in orbit, the Earth is being torn apart by geological forces and natural disasters. A small Autobot team heads to Cybertron to stop Megatron, while the rest of the Autobots try to protect Earth. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons’ hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons' hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Deep in the “Demon Swamp” on the island of Bali, large robotic insects are eating everything in their path and terrorizing the islanders. Megatron realizes they are an ancient breed of Decepticons, and forms an alliance with these powerful Insecticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel, Megatron secretly plots to unleash the latest addition to his Decepticon army—the Constructicons – along with Devastator, a Decepticon unlike any the Autobots have ever seen before!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Spike is wounded and knocked unconscious in a Decepticon attack, Sparkplug and Wheeljack reluctantly transfer his consciousness into their experimental robot, Autobot X, to save him.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: With Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, any object in motion can be frozen. Although it may prove valuable in the fight against evil, it may also prove too dangerous to exist…especially once Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, can freeze any object in motion. It could be a valuable tool in the Autobot's fight against evil, but it may also prove to be too dangerous to exist,especially after Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Time portals are opening up all over the world due to the Decepticons having tapped into the mysterious energy on the island. The Autobots have their hands full trying to keep the peace and return everyone and everything to the correct time.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Accused of treason, Mirage sets out on his own to stop the Decepticons and Insecticons, as well as prove himself innocent. But when his plan to play the two evil forces against each other fails, a chain of events is set off where no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots agree to protect the female ninja robot Nightbird, the most advanced human-made robot ever constructed. But when Megatron gets his hands on Nightbird and reprograms her, it's the Autobots who'll need protecting!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots agree to protect the female ninja robot Nightbird, the most advanced human-made robot ever constructed. But when Megatron gets his hands on Nightbird and reprograms her, it's the Autobots who'll need protecting!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons create a clone of Optimus Prime to lead the Autobots into a trap. When the imposter attempts to lead the others deep into a mine containing a substance lethal to Autobots, it becomes a question of which “Prime” is really Prime.

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: General amnesty follows the shooting of young Les Tanner by hired killers. Hollister (Pat Conway) cannot arrest the gunmen because of amnesty but he prevents a new flare-up of the feud by arresting the victim's brother who is out for revenge.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Young Mark Thompson shoots an old miner in the back, robs him, and flees. Sheriff Hollister trails him to his mother's home in Paradise. In order to expose the son's true character to his faithful mother, Hollister must put his own life on the line.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Against a background of sudden death and romance, Hollister comes to grips with beautiful young widow Sarah Curtice and her band of gunmen. Clay's efforts to combat their expanding crime wave provoke a dramatic showdown with Sarah's hired guns.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When Chris Anderson confesses to Sheriff Hollister that Brewster Flat's Sheriff Binns and his deputy were in on a robbery, Sheriff Hollister 'cuts himself in' to the deal to force a showdown among the thieves and expose a double cross.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Sam Carver (Lee Van Cleef) escapes the custody of Deputy Marshal Bledsoe thanks to some rowdy conventioneers aboard the train. Jumping off, he heads to Tombstone Territory where he takes refuge at Hendrick's ranch.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Clay Hollister rides the stage to Laramie with a court order concerning a murder indictment against a man named Rowan. Clay finds that his fellow passengers include Rowan himself (under an alias) and a hired gun paid to kill the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Harvey Logan and his gunfighters take over the town of Sunglow and have themselves on a spree. Notified that the telegraph line to Sunglow is dead, Sheriff Hollister and editor Claibourne ride over to investigate and are trapped and thrown into jail.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister hears a distant shot but finds nothing to explain it. When Nancy Cooley arrives in Tombstone looking for her uncle who cannot be found, the sheriff solves the riddle of his disappearance and saves Nancy from becoming a gunman's victim.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: All in a day's work for Railroader Bat Masterson. fire, Indians, hail and the loss of two wagons of expensive equipment go over a cliff carrying four men with it. But, Bat's boss of the construction crew and the job gets done!

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson faces a question: Is Marshal Ben Holt the Law or not the Law? - Bat prevents Holt from shooting Harry Sutton in an affray involving an illegal land grab. Investigating, Bat is not too certain the Marshal's charge is just.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: It's 'Wagons, ho!' when Wagon-Master Bat Masterson leads a convoy carrying explosives. For want of better manpower, he settles for some not-too-trust-worthy renegades.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With Yusei still serving out his sentence at The Facility, Jack finds himself having to face off against former Turbo Duel Champion Hunter Pace in a rematch that could send Jack's career up in smoke.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After being sent to the Maximum Security Zone in The Facility, Yusei risks being permanently placed in lockdown when he decides to duel Chief Armstrong in order to win a pardon for his pal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the clash between Yusei and the Chief comes to a shocking conclusion, Yusei must figure out a way to win the battle before his life points get zapped to zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After being freed from the Facility, Yusei risks being re-incarcerated when he tries to take back his Duel Runner from Sector Security's vault.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With Officer Trudge in hot pursuit, Yusei looks to rev his game up before the long arm of the law grabs a hold of him for good!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Yusei can't remember his own name, he agrees to duel a pint-sized player named Leo in the hopes of getting his memory back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As Leo and his pal Dexter venture into the narrows of New Domino City to find the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose, Blister breaks out a plan to keep Yusei's friends in the Satellite Sector safe from Goodwin's goons.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: The stage is set for the Fortune Cup as eight elite duelists vie for the chance to take on reigning champion Jack Atlas. However, for the Master of Ceremonies Rex Goodwin, it's not about who wins or loses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: The second duel of the Fortune Cup is about to get under way as the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose finds herself having to face off against a medieval menace named Sir Randsborg.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Director Goodwin enlists the hypnotic powers of the Professor to expose Luna as a Signer and uncover the secrets she unknowingly knows of the Duel Monsters Spirit World.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between the Professor and Luna continues, Luna looks to keep a promise she made to protect the Duel Monsters Spirit World, but in order for her to succeed, she must first break free of the hypnotic hold the Professor has on her.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With no cards left in his hand and his life points about to get blasted by Greiger, Yusei has one draw left to take down this tower of power to keep in the hunt to duel Jack in the championship round.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: In the second battle of the semifinals, Akiza squares off against the professional profiler Commander Koda, but with her tournament life on the line, can Akiza outplay an opponent who claims to know her every move?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the Fortune Cup Finale one win away, Yusei and Akiza get set to battle it out as Director Goodwin anxiously awaits the final Signer to reveal their Mark of the Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the back-and-forth battle between Akiza and Yusei rages on, Yusei is forced to unleash his mighty Stardust Dragon in order to stop Akiza's grisly garden from squeezing his life points into submission.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the Fortune Cup Finale about to kick into overdrive, Jack decides to clear the air and reveal the truth behind his escape from the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the finish line of the Fortune Cup fast approaching, Yusei and Jack find themselves on a collision course with destiny as they race to unlock the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After defeating Jack to win the Fortune Cup Finale, Yusei is challenged to a Shadow Duel by an underground duelist whose mind has been taken over by the Dark Signers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and his robed rival rages on, Yusei must rely on his deck if he plans to survive this Shadow Duel and uncover the truth behind the Dark Signers sinister scheme to destroy the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
